subject: Starlit progress: ADR-184 hunk boundary handed to Stratospheric; Gilded queue still active
body: Update after your line-scoped direction: I sent Stratospheric the exact ADR-184 bundle and pending-grad hunks in event 2204b9dc-41f1-4732-bc18-967f0e8797b1, then clarified after their d9124e3f block broadcast in event e19c0696-155e-49c1-ba0e-437ee56b5270. Current live queue still has Gilded d9124e3f active, including pending-graduations.md. Starlit ADR-184 files remain unstaged and uncommitted: new ADR file, README index hunk, and pending-grad lines 185, 823, 843-848 only. Standing by for Stratospheric/coordinator queue-order resolution; I am not staging or widening anything.
